message:
feat(types): Add version metadata to MCP components

Add optional version field to Tool, Resource, ResourceTemplate, and
Prompt types for tracking component versions. Also add version() method
to handler traits (ToolHandler, ResourceHandler, PromptHandler) with
default None implementation.

Closes bd-mwy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
